deps/manifest.txt
Purpose: Pin and document all build/runtime dependencies that are vendored in this repo.
Policy: If the app needs it to build or run, it must live under ./deps (not installed "somewhere else").

Philosophy:
No solution is perfect. Since that's true, the question becomes:
What problems are we more comfortable having and/or handling when they arrive?

Shift:
"They should do something about that problem" -> "I should do something about the problems I actually have."

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SECTION A: DEPENDENCY RULES (non-negotiable)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1) Local truth:
   - The repo must build and run using dependencies under ./deps.
   - Do not rely on global machine installs, PATH, or system-wide libraries.

2) Pinning:
   - Every dependency must be pinned to a specific version (or commit hash).
   - No floating versions.

3) Provenance:
   - Record source URL and acquisition date for every dependency.

4) Runtime deployment:
   - If a dependency is required at runtime, it must ship with the product (or be explicitly documented).

5) Changes are intentional:
   - Updates require a changelog entry and a note on testing impact.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SECTION B: DEPENDENCY INVENTORY
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Format:
- Name:
- Category: (build-time / runtime / both)
- Location in repo:
- Version:
- Source:
- Date acquired:
- License:
- Purpose:
- Notes:
- Local modifications:
- Update policy:
- Testing notes:

[DEP-001]
Name: raylib (windows build)
Category: both
Location in repo:
  - deps/include/ (raylib.h, raymath.h, rlgl.h)
  - deps/lib/     (raylib.dll, raylib.lib, raylibdll.lib)
  - (note) a copy of raylib.dll also exists at repo root for convenience when running the exe from there
Version:
  - TODO: record version from deps/include/raylib.h (RAYLIB_VERSION_* macros)
Source:
  - TODO: where you obtained/built this raylib.dll and .lib files (URL or internal path)
Date acquired:
  - TODO
License:
  - TODO (raylib is typically zlib/libpng; record the exact license used by your build)
Purpose:
  - Graphics/audio/input/windowing for this project (raylib)
Notes:
  - This repo vendors raylib to prevent build/run drift across machines.
Local modifications:
  - TODO: none (or list changes if you patched headers/libs)
Update policy:
  - Only if needed (new feature or bug fix required by this project)
Testing notes:
  - Smoke test: builds clean; window opens; draws sprite; plays sound; exits clean.
  - Verify runtime: exe can run from repo root and finds raylib.dll.

[DEP-002]
Name: PellesC toolchain (reference)
Category: build-time
Location in repo: (not vendored here; referenced only)
Version:
  - TODO: exact PellesC version used (and whether installer triggers warnings on newer versions)
Source:
  - TODO: where you obtained the installer (link or archived copy location)
Date acquired:
  - TODO
License:
  - TODO
Purpose:
  - C compiler + IDE used to build this project
Notes:
  - This is recorded so the build can be reproduced later.
Local modifications:
  - none
Update policy:
  - Frozen unless forced (keep a known-good toolchain)
Testing notes:
  - Build from RaylibWin32.ppj succeeds on a clean machine with deps present.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SECTION C: DEPENDENCY CHANGE LOG
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Format:
- Date:
- DEP-###:
- Change: (added/updated/removed)
- From -> To:
- Why:
- Risk:
- Tests performed:
- Notes:

[CHANGELOG]
- Date: YYYY-MM-DD
  DEP-###:
  Change:
  From -> To:
  Why:
  Risk:
  Tests performed:
  Notes:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SECTION D: BUILD "DEV KIT" SNAPSHOT (recommended)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- Primary OS:
- Primary compiler/IDE:
- Compiler version:
- raylib version (from raylib.h):
- Notes:
